researched_category.value: Web scraping and automation platform / AI agent tools marketplace
researched_category.notes: Apify provides a cloud platform for building and running web scraping Actors, and also hosts a marketplace of thousands of pre-built tools for AI agents.

one_liner.value: Apify is a cloud platform for building, deploying, and managing web scraping and automation tools (called Actors), offering a marketplace of thousands of pre-built tools and API access for AI agents.

methods.notes: Primary REST API uses API token via Bearer header (api_key). OAuth2 is available via the MCP server (streamable HTTP with OAuth). Also supports agentic payments (x402/Skyfire) for agentic use without a user account.

access.notes: Free plan is permanent, no credit card required, gives $5/month prepaid platform usage. API tokens are available immediately upon account creation.

summary.value: Comprehensive REST API v2 covering Actors (runs, builds), datasets, key-value stores, request queues, tasks, schedules, webhooks, proxy management, and account information. OpenAPI schema downloadable. Official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, Java, Rust, .NET, PHP.

agent_interface.notes: Apify provides an official hosted MCP server at mcp.apify.com with OAuth or Bearer token auth. Composio has both an Apify REST toolkit (113 tools) and an Apify MCP toolkit (8 tools).

rationale.value: Apify has a fully documented public REST API (v2), official SDKs, an official MCP server, free self-serve access with no credit card required, and existing agent toolkit integrations (Composio). There are no material blockers to building an agent toolkit today.

s1.quote: Apify is the largest marketplace of trusted tools for AI. Get real-time web data, track competitors, generate leads, monitor social media, and integrate your apps and agents.
s1.title: Apify: The largest marketplace of trusted tools for AI

s2.quote: The Apify API (version 2) provides programmatic access to the Apify platform. The API is organized around RESTful HTTP endpoints.
s2.title: Apify API | Apify Documentation

s3.quote: You can find your API token on the Integrations page in the Apify Console. To use your token in a request... Add the token to your request's Authorization header as Bearer <token>.
s3.title: Apify API - Authentication

s4.quote: You can connect to the Apify MCP server in two ways: use our hosted service for a quick and easy setup using Streamable HTTP with OAuth, or run the server locally for development and testing using local stdio.
s4.title: Apify MCP server - OAuth

s5.quote: Free | $0 | $0 | $5 | No Apify Store discount | Community support
s5.title: Apify Pricing

s6.quote: Apify's Free plan is permanent, requires no credit card, and grants $5 in prepaid platform usage every billing cycle at a $0.20/CU compute rate.
s6.title: Apify Free Tier Pricing 2026

s7.quote: You can download the complete OpenAPI schema of Apify API in the YAML or JSON formats.
s7.title: Apify API - OpenAPI

s8.quote: For Node.js, we recommend the apify-client NPM package. For Python, we recommend the apify-client PyPI package. For Go, we recommend the apify-client package.
s8.title: Apify API - API Clients

s9.quote: The Apify's MCP server (mcp.apify.com) allows AI applications and agents to interact with the Apify platform using Model Context Protocol (MCP).
s9.title: Apify MCP server

s11.quote: Apify MCP | Auth: DCR_OAUTH | Tools: 8 | AI-powered web scraping and automation platform. Run actors, scrape websites, and automate browser tasks via the official Apify MCP server.
s11.title: Apify MCP - Composio Toolkit

limitations: No phone verification or company email required for free signup - just email/password signup.
The free plan has $5/month prepaid usage cap but is sufficient for API exploration and small-scale use.
